💬 Contact Us
🔥 398 AI MODELS · $5/MO FLAT · ZERO DOWNTIME

398 AI Models. $5/mo Flat. OpenRouter Alternative.

OpenRouter charges $20/mo for 200 models. 1AI gives you 398 models — $5 flat. All models. No limits. Auto-failover built-in.

Try Free — 1000 Requests →View All Models
✓Setup <5 menit
✓Garansi 7 hari
✓Support via Telegram

If you're a developer or agency using AI, this is probably familiar.

💸

$20/mo for only 200 models. You need more models but don't want to pay premium.

🔥

Your app crashes. Customers complain. You panic scramble. No auto-failover = downtime.

🌍

Credit card required. USD fluctuation. No local payment options like GoPay/OVO/DANA.

📊

5 providers = 5 billing dashboards, 5 different response formats. Monitoring nightmare.

1AI: 398 models, $5 flat, auto-failover, local payment.

🎯

398 AI Models

GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen, Mistral, and 391+ more. OpenRouter has 200. We have 398.

🛡️

Auto-Failover

Primary provider down? 1AI auto-switches to backup in 50ms. Zero downtime. Zero panic.

💸

Cost Optimizer

Simple task → cheap model. Complex task → premium model. Save 70% without sacrificing quality.

🆓

7 Free Tiers

auto/free-chat, auto/free-coding, auto/free-vision, auto/free-reasoning. Free models for testing and light usage.

💳

Local Payment

GoPay, OVO, DANA, QRIS, BCA Transfer. No credit card required. No USD fluctuation.

💬

Telegram Support

Response <5 minutes. Not email support that takes days. Real human, real-time help.

🔑

Single API Key

One 1AI key = access to all 398 models. Manage permissions per key, per team, per project.

📊

Usage Dashboard

Monitor spending, latency, and errors per provider in real-time. One dashboard for everything.

🔌

OpenAI Compatible

Drop-in replacement. Change the base URL, done. No code changes required.

398 Models from 18 Providers

GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, GPT-4 Turbo
Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Opus, Claude 3 Haiku
Gemini 2.5 Pro, Gemini 2.0 Flash, Gemini 1.5 Pro
DeepSeek V3, DeepSeek R1, DeepSeek Coder
Llama 3.3 70B, Llama 3.1 405B, Llama 3.1 8B
Qwen 2.5 72B, Qwen 2.5 Coder, QwQ 32B
Mistral Large, Mistral Small, Mixtral 8x7B
And 370+ more models from BytePlus, SiliconFlow, Replicate, Fal.ai, G4F, and more

One Endpoint. All Models.

curl https://api.1ai.aitradepulse.com/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-1ai-****" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "auto",
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}]
  }'

# ✓ ROUTED → gemini-2.0-flash (98ms, cost: $0.00012)

⚡ Cara Kerja

Start in 2 Minutes

1

Sign Up & Get Key

Create an account, get your 1AI API key. Free for first 1000 requests.

2

Change Base URL

Replace the OpenAI base URL in your code with the 1AI endpoint. No other changes.

3

Send Requests

Your requests are automatically routed to the optimal provider. Monitor results in the dashboard.

Mulai kapan saja. Cancel kapan saja. Garansi 7 hari uang kembali.
